title: The Best Homemade Sugar Scrub Recipe (Easy & Natural)
meta_description: Make the best homemade sugar scrub recipe with simple, natural ingredients. Silky skin in minutes — plus variations for body, face, lips, and gifts.
image_prompt: Lifestyle photography, a rustic ceramic mixing bowl filled with a glistening pale golden sugar scrub, a small wooden spoon resting across the rim with granules of raw cane sugar scattered loosely around it, a small open glass jar of white coconut oil with a wooden scoop leaning against it placed beside the bowl, a handful of raw cane sugar crystals spilled casually across the linen surface in the foreground, natural undyed linen fabric spread flat filling the full frame edge to edge, soft diffused overcast window light from above with no harsh shadows, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
